HomePage.title: Your Files Stay with You. Always.
HomePage.philosophyTitle: Privacy Is Not a Feature. It's a Requirement.
HomePage.philosophyBody1: Most online tools work by uploading your files to a server, processing them, and returning the result. That model is inherently broken from a privacy standpoint.
HomePage.philosophyBody2: PrivaFlow was built from the ground up to eliminate this completely. Your files never leave your device — not even for a millisecond.
HomePage.stepsBody: Every tool on PrivaFlow follows the same architecture: load into RAM, process locally, output to device. The cycle is self-contained — completely invisible to any external system.
HomePage.step1Desc: Drag and drop, or click to select. Your file loads directly into browser memory — nothing is sent anywhere.
HomePage.step2Desc: Our WASM and Canvas engines run the operation natively in your tab. Zero server involvement, ever.
HomePage.step3Desc: Get your output instantly. It's created directly in your browser and downloaded straight to your device.
HomePage.pillar1Desc: Every byte of your files is processed inside your own device RAM. We never see it. No logs, no tracking, no server hits.
HomePage.pillar2Desc: We use Web APIs, Canvas, WebAssembly, and PDF.js to run complex operations entirely in your tab — no plugins needed.
HomePage.pillar3Desc: Once loaded, most tools function completely offline. Your data stays inside your device even when the network is gone.

footer.copyright: © 2026 · Zero tracking · Zero uploads · Built for the open web

HomePage.subtitle: Most websites steal your files. We don't. Everything you do stays inside your screen. It's 100% private and 100% free.

toolDescriptions.redactor: Use the brush to paint over secrets.
toolDescriptions.cleanExif: Remove the 'hidden map' from your pictures.
toolDescriptions.password: Make very strong secret codes that only you can know.
toolDescriptions.textEncryptor: Turn your writing into a secret code that only you can unlock.
toolDescriptions.compress: Make big files small so they send faster.
toolDescriptions.heic: Make iPhone pictures work on any computer without special apps.
toolDescriptions.mediaConverter: Change video or music files so they play perfectly on any device.
toolDescriptions.svgToPng: Take designer drawings and turn them into simple photos everyone can see.
toolDescriptions.blur: Use a magic brush to hide faces or private things in your pictures.
toolDescriptions.merger: Pick many separate files and put them together into one clean book.
toolDescriptions.pdfToWord: Change a locked file into a document you can type in and edit.
toolDescriptions.unlock: Remove a password you already know so the file stays open.
toolDescriptions.pdfToImg: Save every single page of your file as a separate picture.
toolDescriptions.split: Choose only the pages you need from a big file and save them separately.
toolDescriptions.sign: Use your mouse or finger to draw your signature and place it on any page instantly.
toolDescriptions.stamp: Put your name or your logo on top of your photos to protect them from being stolen.
toolDescriptions.repair: Fix a document that is broken or shows an error so you can open it again.
toolDescriptions.numberPages: Put a small number on the bottom of every page so your file is organized and easy to read.
toolDescriptions.organizePages: Move pages around, delete the ones you don't need, or add new ones to your file.

redactor.before: A letter with your phone number.
redactor.after: The number is gone under a solid black line forever.

cleanExif.before: A photo that shows exactly where you live.
cleanExif.after: A photo that is safe to share with strangers.

encrypt.before: A secret note anyone can read.
encrypt.after: Jumbled letters that only you can unlock.

compress.before: A 'heavy' photo that is slow to send.
compress.after: A 'light' photo that looks exactly the same but sends instantly.

heic.before: An iPhone picture that won't open on PC.
heic.after: A standard photo that works everywhere.

mediaConverter.before: A video that won't play on your phone.
mediaConverter.after: A perfect file that plays on any device.

svgToPng.after: A simple photo for everyone to see.

blur.before: A photo showing a private face.
blur.after: The same photo with the face hidden.

merger.after: One clean document with everything inside.

pdfToDocx.before: A file you can't edit or type in.
pdfToDocx.after: A Word file you can fix and change.

unlock.before: A file that asks for a password every time.
unlock.after: A file that opens instantly for anyone.

pdfToImg.before: A document you have to scroll through.

split.after: The exact 2 pages you actually needed.

HomePage.toolSubtitle: Easy tools to help you with your {category}.

session.label: Cleanup
session.clearDesc: Wipe away everything you've done and start fresh on your screen.

cta.title: Your Privacy is a Right.
cta.desc: We built this because we believe your files should stay yours. No cost, no tricks, just privacy.

HomePage.mergeDropDesc: Select your PDF documents to combine them into a single file.

step1.title: Stage Your Files
step1.desc: Select the documents or media you want to transform.

step2.title: Local Synthesis
step2.desc: Our engine reconstructs your data inside a secure sandbox on your hardware. No bit ever leaves your machine.

step3.title: Secure Export
step3.desc: Download your finished work. The sandbox is wiped clean the second you close the tab.

visualProof.label: Visual Evidence
visualProof.title: See the Magic
visualProof.desc: Visual proof of our tools in action. Everything you see happens privately inside your screen.

default.title: PrivaFlow | Your Files Stay With You

redact.title: Redact PDF
redact.description: Permanently destroy sensitive data in document vectors.

howItWorks.title: Upload Your PDF
howItWorks.description: Drop any PDF that has text or info you want to hide permanently.

howItWorks.title: Draw Over the Text
howItWorks.description: Click and drag a box over any word, name, number, or section you want removed.

howItWorks.title: Download the Redacted File
howItWorks.description: Save the cleaned PDF — the hidden parts are gone forever, not just covered.

unlockPdf.title: Unlock a File
unlockPdf.description: Unlock a password-protected PDF file instantly.
unlockPdf.dropDesc: We'll open it up so you can access your data safely.
unlockPdf.successDesc: Your file is now completely open and ready for use.
unlockPdf.alreadyUnlocked: This PDF is not password protected. It is already unlocked.
unlockPdf.invalidPdf: Invalid PDF or an unexpected error occurred.
unlockPdf.failedUnlock: Failed to unlock PDF. The file might be corrupted or uses unsupported encryption.
unlockPdf.privacyHint: Your password never leaves your device. Everything runs locally in your browser.
unlockPdf.transientMemory: This PDF is processed in a transient memory buffer. No data survives the session.

step1.title: Select Locked PDF
step1.desc: Upload the encrypted file you need to access. We never see your password.

step2.title: Enter Password
step2.desc: Provide the current password to decrypt the file's security header locally.

step3.title: Export Unlocked
step3.desc: The security layer is removed, and you can save the fully accessible PDF.

svgToPng.title: Logo Converter
svgToPng.description: Turn designer vector drawings into high-quality photos.

step1.title: Drop Your SVG
step1.desc: Select any SVG file. It loads directly into your browser — nothing is uploaded.

step2.title: 2× Rasterization
step2.desc: Your vector is drawn onto an HTML canvas at 2× resolution to prevent aliasing.

step3.title: Download PNG
step3.desc: The PNG is generated entirely in your browser and saved directly to your device.

pdfToImg.title: File to Pictures
pdfToImg.description: Turn every page of your PDF into high-quality image files.
pdfToImg.dropDesc: We'll capture every page as a high-fidelity photo.
pdfToImg.pdfjsDesc: Uses Mozilla's PDF.js to render slices directly to canvas. Your documents never touch our infra.

step1.title: Load Your PDF
step1.desc: Drop any PDF document. Each page is rendered locally as a high-res asset.

step2.title: Page-to-Pixel
step2.desc: Our engine captures every page buffer and converts them into crisp JPG or PNG images.

step3.title: Save Gallery
step3.desc: Download individual pages or the entire collection as a ZIP archive.

pdfToDocx.title: File to Word
pdfToDocx.description: Convert your PDF into an editable Word document.
pdfToDocx.dropTitle: Drop your PDF here to edit it.
pdfToDocx.dropDesc: We'll reconstruct the text so you can type and fix things.
pdfToDocx.errorDesc: Synthesis failed. Please ensure the file isn't encrypted.
pdfToDocx.howThisWorksDesc: Your PDF text is extracted directly in the browser and saved as a Word file. Nothing is uploaded.

password.title: Secure Code Generator
password.description: Generate industrial-grade passwords that only you can know.

step1.title: Set Entropy
step1.desc: Choose the length and complexity (symbols, numbers) for your secret code.

step2.title: Generate Locally
step2.desc: Your browser's crypto engine constructs a high-entropy string instantly.

step3.title: Copy & Use
step3.desc: Copy your new iron-clad password. We never see it and never store it.

password.entropyDesc: Generated via window.crypto.getRandomValues. The result is never stored outside your screen.

mediaConverter.title: Video & Music Fixer
mediaConverter.description: Change video or music files so they play perfectly on any device.
mediaConverter.dropDesc: We'll fix the format so it works everywhere.

step1.title: Pick Your File
step1.desc: Drop any video or audio file onto the box. No account needed — it stays on your device the whole time.

step2.title: Choose What to Do
step2.desc: Select the output format (MP3, WAV) or trim the video to just the part you want.

step3.title: Download the Result
step3.desc: Click Convert and your file is ready in seconds. Everything happens inside your browser — nothing is sent anywhere.

compress.title: Image Asset Optimizer
compress.description: Reduce file size while preserving professional visual fidelity.
compress.dropDesc: We'll optimize the file size without sacrificing quality.
compress.resultPlaceholder: Drop an image to see the compression results here.

step1.title: Drop Your Image
step1.desc: Select the photo you want to optimize. It stays on your device.

step2.title: Set Target Size
step2.desc: Adjust the quality slider to find the perfect balance between size and clarity.

step3.title: Download Result
step3.desc: Get your optimized image instantly. Zero quality loss in balanced mode.

pdfMerge.title: Combine PDFs
pdfMerge.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one secure document in your browser.
pdfMerge.dropDesc: We'll combine them into a single file locally.
pdfMerge.assemblyDesc: Everything happens safely inside your own screen. No persistent traces left on disk or network.
pdfMerge.synthesisDesc: Done! Everything stayed inside your screen. Your multi-node PDF is ready for export.

step1.title: Add Your Files
step1.desc: Drop all the PDF files you want to combine. You can add as many as you need.

step2.title: Set the Order
step2.desc: Drag files to arrange them in the order you want them to appear in the final document.

step3.title: Download Result
step3.desc: Click merge and get a single, ready-to-share PDF file in seconds.

sign.title: Sign a Paper
sign.description: Draw your signature and place it on any page instantly.
sign.signHere: Sign here with mouse or finger
sign.dropDesc: Selected PDF will be rendered for signing.
sign.ready: Signature Ready. Drag it on the preview.
sign.hint: Use the arrows to flip pages. Drag your signature to the precise spot.
sign.sidebarHint: Use the sidebar to draw your signature and place it on the document.

step1.title: Drop Your PDF
step1.desc: Load the document you need to sign. It's rendered locally for privacy.

step2.title: Draw Signature
step2.desc: Use your mouse or touchscreen to draw a natural signature on the virtual pad.

step3.title: Place & Export
step3.desc: Drag your signature onto the page, adjust the size, and save the signed document.

stamp.title: Stamp a Photo
stamp.description: Put your name or logo on your photos.
stamp.dropDesc: We'll help you protect your visual assets.

step1.title: Upload Image
step1.desc: Select the photo you want to protect. No data leaves your machine.

step2.title: Design Watermark
step2.desc: Enter your name or upload a logo. Adjust transparency and placement.

step3.title: Save Stamped
step3.desc: The watermark is baked into the pixels locally. Your original stays private.

repair.title: Fix Broken File
repair.description: Fix a document that is broken or shows an error.
repair.dropDesc: We'll attempt to restore structural integrity.
repair.successDesc: VaultNode logic successfully sanitized and reconstructed the PDF structure.

step1.title: Drop Corrupt PDF
step1.desc: Select the file that won't open. Our engine scans the bitstream locally.

step2.title: Header Recovery
step2.desc: We attempt to rebuild the PDF's internal cross-reference tables and headers.

step3.title: Restore & Save
step3.desc: If the data is recoverable, a healthy PDF is synthesized for you to download.

numberPages.title: Number every Page
numberPages.description: Put small numbers on the bottom of every page.
numberPages.dropDesc: We'll help you organize your document.
numberPages.layoutDesc: Numbers will be applied to every page of the document.

step1.title: Upload Document
step1.desc: Drop the PDF you want to paginate. Everything stays in your browser's RAM.

step2.title: Pick Position
step2.desc: Choose where you want the numbers to appear: bottom-left, center, or right.

step3.title: Auto-Paginate
step3.desc: Our script injects the page indices and generates your new numbered file.

organizePages.title: Organize Pages
organizePages.description: Move pages around or delete the ones you don't need.
organizePages.dropDesc: Drag to reorder, click to delete.
organizePages.emptyQueue: No pages left in the queue.

step1.title: Load Document
step1.desc: Drop the PDF you want to modify. We render thumbnail previews for every page.

step2.title: Reorder & Prune
step2.desc: Drag thumbnails to change the page sequence. Click the trash icon to remove unneeded pages.

step3.title: Save Assembly
step3.desc: Our engine synthesizes the new page order into a clean PDF ready for export.

pdfSplit.title: Extract PDF Pages
pdfSplit.description: Securely extract specific pages or ranges from your PDF documents.
pdfSplit.dropDesc: We'll help you extract the pages you need.
pdfSplit.rangeHint: Leave empty to extract all pages as individual files.
pdfSplit.splitDesc: Your document is parsed and re-composed entirely privately. No persistent file system writes occur.

step1.title: Choose PDF
step1.desc: Upload the document you want to split. It's processed entirely in your RAM.

step2.title: Select Ranges
step2.desc: Pick individual pages or define a range (e.g., 5-12) to extract from the source.

step3.title: Pull & Save
step3.desc: The selected bitstreams are pulled into a new PDF registry for instant download.

heicToJpg.title: iPhone Asset Fixer
heicToJpg.description: Convert iPhone HEIC files into high-compatibility JPG photos.
heicToJpg.dropDesc: We'll turn it into a standard photo that works everywhere.
heicToJpg.errorDesc: Failed to transcode HEIC. Signal integrity compromised.
heicToJpg.sandboxDesc: HEIF packets are fully decimated and reconstructed locally. Cloud connectivity is strictly restricted.

step1.title: Select HEIC
step1.desc: Drop an Apple HEIC image (high-efficiency container). It stays on your device.

step2.title: Local Decode
step2.desc: Our engine decodes the HEIF stream and extracts the pixel map without server help.

step3.title: Export JPG
step3.desc: The pixel data is recoded into a universal JPG file and saved to your device.

cleanExif.title: Metadata Scrubber
cleanExif.description: Wipe away the 'hidden map' and private tracking data from your pictures.
cleanExif.dropTitle: Drop your photo here to sanitize it.
cleanExif.dropDesc: We'll reconstruct the image on a clean canvas to wipe all metadata.

step1.title: Select Image
step1.desc: Choose the photo you want to sanitize.

step2.title: Metadata Scrubbing
step2.desc: Our engine reconstructs the image on a clean canvas to wipe all EXIF data.

step3.title: Secure Export
step3.desc: Download your fully anonymous photo safely.

encrypt.title: Secure Note Encryption
encrypt.description: Lock your private writing inside a cryptographic vault only you can open.
encrypt.passwordPlaceholder: Type a key only you know...

step1.title: Write Your Note
step1.desc: Type or paste the sensitive text you want to secure from prying eyes.

step2.title: Apply Cipher
step2.desc: Enter a secret key. We use AES-256 to turn your text into an unreadable scramble.

step3.title: Store Anywhere
step3.desc: Copy the encrypted block. Only someone with your exact key can ever read it again.

encrypt.cryptoDesc: Uses PBKDF2 for key derivation and AES-256-GCM for authenticated encryption. Keys never leave browser memory.

blur.title: Image Enhancer
blur.description: Sharpen blurry photos or smooth noise — your image stays on your device, never uploaded.
blur.sandboxDesc: Pixels are transformed in a volatile HTML5 canvas. Zero persistent artifacts.

howItWorks.title: Drop Your Image
howItWorks.description: Pick any photo you want to sharpen or fix. It stays on your device — nothing is uploaded.

howItWorks.title: Adjust the Strength
howItWorks.description: Use the slider to control how sharp the result should be. More strength means a clearer image.

howItWorks.title: Save the Result
howItWorks.description: Click process and download your enhanced image instantly.

SecurityProof.trustStatement: WE DON'T ASK FOR YOUR TRUST; WE PROVE IT.
SecurityProof.trustExplanation: Since your files never leave your screen, we couldn't see them even if we wanted to.

PrivacyReport.label: Audit & Compliance
PrivacyReport.title: NO-SERVER ARCHITECTURE
PrivacyReport.subtitle: How PrivaFlow protects your data without ever seeing it.

steps.step1Desc: Every single computation — whether it's PDF redaction or video conversion — happens entirely within your browser using WASM (WebAssembly) and FFmpeg.wasm. No data is sent to a backend.
steps.step2Desc: We do not have a database for your files. We do not have a bucket for your uploads. There is nowhere for your data to go except your own local storage.
steps.step3Desc: Our entire source code is available on GitHub. Anyone can inspect how we handle data and verify that no telemetry or sneaky tracking scripts exist.
steps.step4Desc: Files are processed in ephemeral browser memory. Once you refresh the page or close the tab, the processing environment is wiped clean.

ContactPage.label: Contact
ContactPage.title: Let's Talk.
ContactPage.body1: We built PrivaFlow for you. Your feedback, bug reports, and feature ideas shape every update. Send us a message and we typically respond within 24 hours.
ContactPage.successDesc: We got your message and will get back to you within 24 hours. Thank you.
ContactPage.placeholderMessage: Tell us what's on your mind...
ContactPage.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly at hello@privaflow.com
ContactPage.privacyNote: PrivaFlow is built with privacy-first principles. Your contact information is only used to respond to your message and is never shared or sold.

validation.name: Name is required
validation.message: Message must be at least 10 characters
